tree.notes: Daming learns to swim and shows off his other sports abilities.
tree.statement: This section shows Daming's progress in learning to swim.
tree.explanation: 本板块展示了大明学习游泳的进度。

children.notes: The leading question of this section.
children.statement: Daming can do everything from the beginning.
children.explanation: 大明并不是一开始什么都会，他最开始不会游泳。

children.cn: 女孩：“你能跳得高吗，大明？”
children.statement: The girl is asking Daming if he can jump high.
children.explanation: 女孩在询问大明是否能跳得高。

children.statement: Daming can jump high.
children.explanation: 大明会跳高。

children.statement: The girl wants to know if Daming runs fast.
children.explanation: 女孩想知道大明跑得快不快。

children.statement: Daming cannot run fast.
children.explanation: 大明跑得快。

children.statement: Ping-pong is also known as table tennis.
children.explanation: ping-pong也可以被称为table tennis（乒乓球）。

children.statement: Daming can play ping-pong.
children.explanation: 大明会打乒乓球。

children.statement: The boy asks Daming if he is able to swim.
children.explanation: 男孩问大明是否会游泳。

children.text: "No, I can't. But I can learn."
children.cn: 大明：“不，我不会。但我可以学习。”
children.notes: Daming cannot swim at first, but is willing to learn.
children.statement: Daming refuses to learn how to swim.
children.explanation: 大明说他可以去学游泳，并没有拒绝。

children.statement: Daming has learned to swim by now.
children.explanation: 此时大明已经学会了游泳。

children.statement: The boy is surprised by Daming's swimming speed.
children.explanation: 男孩对大明的游泳速度感到惊讶。

tree.notes: The moving story of Terry Fox running across Canada for cancer research.
tree.statement: Terry Fox ran for cancer awareness and research funding.
tree.explanation: 泰里·福克斯为了癌症宣传和研究基金而跑。

children.text: Why does Terry run across Canada?
children.cn: 泰里为什么要跑过加拿大？
children.notes: The guide question of this reading passage.
children.statement: Terry runs across Canada to win a racing gold medal.
children.explanation: 泰里是为了给癌症患者筹集资金而跑，不是为了得金牌。

children.text: "I'm Terry Fox. I like running and playing basketball."
children.cn: “我是泰里·福克斯。我喜欢跑步和打篮球。”
children.statement: Terry liked running and basketball.
children.explanation: 泰里喜欢跑步和打篮球。

children.text: "But I lose one leg because of cancer."
children.cn: “但我因为癌症失去了一条腿。”
children.statement: Terry lost both of his legs due to cancer.
children.explanation: 泰里只失去了一条腿(one leg)，不是两条。

children.text: "Can I help other people with cancer?"
children.notes: Terry wonders how to help others.
children.statement: Terry wanted to help other people diagnosed with cancer.
children.explanation: 泰里想帮助其他癌症患者。

children.text: "I can run across Canada. And I can get money for people!"
children.cn: “我可以跑步穿过加拿大。我可以为人们募捐！”
children.notes: Canada is a very large country.
children.statement: Terry's plan was to raise money by running across Canada.
children.explanation: 泰里的计划是通过跑过加拿大来为人们募捐。

children.text: "It's hard for me. Many kind people help me."
children.cn: “这对我来说很困难。许多善良的人帮助我。”
children.notes: Running on a prosthetic leg is extremely difficult.
children.statement: No one helped Terry on his run.
children.explanation: 许多善良的人帮助了他(Many kind people help me)。

children.text: "Come on, Terry! You can do it!"
children.statement: The people cheered to support Terry.
children.explanation: 人们大喊加油来支持泰里。

children.statement: Terry believed in himself.
children.explanation: 泰里内心相信自己能做到。

children.statement: Terry ran for five weeks before stopping.
children.explanation: 他坚持跑了五个月(five months)，不是五周。

children.text: "But I'm very ill. I can't run anymore."
children.cn: “但我病得很重。我再也不能跑了。”
children.notes: Terry had to stop due to the cancer spreading.
children.statement: Terry stopped running because he was tired of running.
children.explanation: 泰里停止跑步是因为他病得很重(very ill)，而不是因为厌倦了跑步。

children.text: Now many people do the Terry Fox Run every year.
children.cn: 现在许多人每年都参加泰里·福克斯义跑。
children.notes: The Terry Fox Run is a global event today.
children.statement: People remember Terry Fox by doing a run every year.
children.explanation: 人们每年通过跑步来纪念泰里·福克斯。

children.cn: “让我们用跑步来纪念泰里吧。”
children.notes: A call to action to commemorate Terry's run.
children.statement: The speaker suggests doing a run to remember Terry.
children.explanation: 说话者建议通过跑步的方式来纪念泰里。

tree.notes: Opening of the sports day chant.
tree.statement: This section introduces the chant for Sports Day.
tree.explanation: 本小节介绍了运动会的歌谣。

children.statement: The speaker wants everyone to stay away.
children.explanation: 说话者是让大家快来参加(Come on, everybody)，而不是远离。

children.notes: Talking about the limitation in running speed.
children.statement: The speaker is able to run extremely fast.
children.explanation: 说话者跑得不是很快(can't run very fast)。

children.notes: Talking about the limitation in jumping distance.
children.statement: The speaker has difficulty jumping a long distance.
children.explanation: 说话者跳得不是很远(can't jump very far)。

children.notes: It's okay to fail as long as you try.
children.statement: Failing is unacceptable in the sports day.
children.explanation: 歌谣中说失败也是没关系的(It's OK to fail)。

children.statement: The chant encourages students to stop when they fail.
children.explanation: 歌谣鼓励大家别放弃、永不停止(Don't give up! Never stop!)。

children.text: Work hard and try your best!
children.cn: 努力付出，尽你最大的努力！
children.statement: Students should try their best.
children.explanation: 学生们应当尽最大的努力。

tree.text: Look, they are this year's sports stars!
tree.cn: 看，他们是今年的运动明星！
tree.notes: The teacher introduces the school's sports stars.
tree.statement: The teacher is introducing the sports stars of the current year.
tree.explanation: 老师正在介绍今年的运动明星。

children.text: That is my friend, Wang Li. She can run very fast.
children.cn: 那是我的朋友王丽。她能跑得很快。
children.notes: Wang Li's sports talent is running.
children.statement: Wang Li is not good at running.
children.explanation: 王丽跑得很快，她很擅长跑步。

children.text: And that is Li Min. He can play basketball very well. He can jump very high.
children.cn: 那是李敏。他篮球打得很好。他能跳得很高。
children.notes: Li Min is good at basketball and jumping high.
children.statement: Li Min can jump very high.
children.explanation: 李敏能跳得很高(jump very high)。

children.text: Is that Zhu Chen? Yes, she can swim very fast.
children.cn: 那是朱晨吗？是的，她游得很快。
children.notes: Zhu Chen's talent is fast swimming.
children.statement: Zhu Chen is a fast swimmer.
children.explanation: 朱晨游得很快(swim very fast)。

children.text: They're all good at sports and they all work very hard.
children.cn: 他们都很擅长运动，而且都非常努力。
children.notes: Hard work is the key to their success.
children.statement: The sports stars became good without working hard.
children.explanation: 他们都非常努力(work very hard)。
